prompt: Create a vertical cinematic photorealistic portrait of a Japanese high school girl with long dark purple hair crouching in the middle of a rainy city street, viewed from an extremely low wide-angle perspective with one loafer and white ribbed sock large in the foreground and her reflection visible in the glossy puddled asphalt. She wears a beige blazer, white shirt, gray necktie, red plaid skirt, white knee socks, and brown penny loafers, holding a transparent clear umbrella above her head with delicate pink cherry blossom petals scattered across the canopy and floating through the rain. Her face is softly obscured by a smooth rectangular blur, while her posture remains gentle and intimate. In her other arm she cradles a small fluffy gray-and-white kitten against her chest. The background is a misty modern urban street with tall buildings dissolved into pale gray bokeh, falling rain streaks, oversized suspended water droplets, ripples in puddles, and scattered sakura petals on the wet ground. Use a dreamy spring-rain atmosphere, soft diffused overcast light, shallow depth of field, glossy reflections, realistic fabric texture, wet skin highlights, detailed umbrella ribs and raindrops, emotional quiet mood, high-end fashion editorial composition, ultra-detailed photorealism, 9:16 vertical aspect ratio.
